[Diagnostics](https://www.medtechdive.com/topic/diagnostics/) # Recalls * * * * [![Image 10: A sign for the Food And Drug Administration is seen outside of the headquarters on July 20, 2020 in White Oak, Maryland.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/Lyloj6vEMWcS38IsdDxD7C8_-oqK1jmN0KyhvTCDftQ/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xMjI3NzEwNTIwX0w2OGs1OEwuanBn.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/4-medtech-manufacturers-recall-kits-over-problem-with-medline-syringes/820181/) ![Image 11: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Sarah Silbiger via Getty Images ![Image 12: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [4 medtech manufacturers recall kits over problem with Medline syringes](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/4-medtech-manufacturers-recall-kits-over-problem-with-medline-syringes/820181/) AVID Medical, Aligned Medical Solutions, Medical Action Industries and American Contract Systems all sent notices to customers about convenience kits that contain recalled Medline angiographic syringes. By [Elise Reuter](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ereuter/) •May 13, 2026 * [![Image 13: A sign for the Food And Drug Administration is seen outside of the headquarters on July 20, 2020 in White Oak, Maryland.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/dyL1-qKnb24LTGjwvbDwGPQ14IR6LWNupvalRbEtDR8/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xMjI3NzEwNDk4X0F5QktzVk0uanBn.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/medline-recalls-angiographic-syringes-receives-fda-warning-letter/817433/) ![Image 14: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Sarah Silbiger via Getty Images ![Image 15: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Medline recalls angiographic syringes, receives FDA warning letter](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/medline-recalls-angiographic-syringes-receives-fda-warning-letter/817433/) The company removed the devices from the market in February following complaints of the syringes disconnecting from manifolds. By [Elise Reuter](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ereuter/) •April 14, 2026 * [![Image 16: Philips, Trilogy, evo, respirator](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/nHHNFtW5wi0zG7in6NX4sjoDvyEzSuJmm1JcWrdbt54/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9QaGlsaXBzX1RyaWxvZ3lfRXZvLmpwZw==.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/philips-warns-not-to-use-certain-nebulizers-in-trilogy-evo-ventilator-recal/816981/) ![Image 17: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Courtesy of Philips ![Image 18: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Philips warns not to use certain nebulizers in Trilogy Evo ventilator recall](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/philips-warns-not-to-use-certain-nebulizers-in-trilogy-evo-ventilator-recal/816981/) Using non-pneumatic nebulizers with the ventilators can lead to under-delivery of therapy to patients, the company said. By [Elise Reuter](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ereuter/) • Updated April 9, 2026 * [![Image 19: A modern office building with large reflective glass windows is shown behind a wide driveway and landscaped entrance. In the foreground, a white and orange monument sign reads "Intuitive Surgical" with the number "1020" vertically on the side.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/m_HXHZtLUXXMp7FGD68aKmV2m5SID9-ZD4xaaoX-rfg/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9NVDFDQjkuanBn.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/intuitive-surgical-recalls-stapler-reloads-over-issue-linked-to-patient-dea/815158/) ![Image 20: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Alamy ![Image 21: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Intuitive Surgical recalls stapler reloads over issue linked to patient death](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/intuitive-surgical-recalls-stapler-reloads-over-issue-linked-to-patient-dea/815158/) The recall follows reports of incomplete staple lines in procedures using the company’s da Vinci surgical robots. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •March 19, 2026 * * [![Image 22: A person sits in front of a plate of food, holding

chunks.text: on the side.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/m_HXHZtLUXXMp7FGD68aKmV2m5SID9-ZD4xaaoX-rfg/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9NVDFDQjkuanBn.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/intuitive-surgical-recalls-stapler-reloads-over-issue-linked-to-patient-dea/815158/) ![Image 20: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Alamy ![Image 21: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Intuitive Surgical recalls stapler reloads over issue linked to patient death](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/intuitive-surgical-recalls-stapler-reloads-over-issue-linked-to-patient-dea/815158/) The recall follows reports of incomplete staple lines in procedures using the company’s da Vinci surgical robots. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •March 19, 2026 * * [![Image 22: A person sits in front of a plate of food, holding a smartphone. They're wearing a patch on their left arm.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/NBT9UN72WOIsMEHP6sW4UTUJik8irk-A0rzf29DxLb0/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9JbnN1bGV0X29tbmlwb2RfNS5qcGc=.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/insulet-reports-18-serious-adverse-events-with-recall-of-omnipod-5-insulin/814689/) ![Image 23: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Courtesy of Insulet Corp. ![Image 24: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Insulet reports 18 serious adverse events with recall of Omnipod 5 insulin pumps](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/insulet-reports-18-serious-adverse-events-with-recall-of-omnipod-5-insulin/814689/) The company is recalling certain lots of its insulin patch pumps after finding a small tear in the internal tubing may cause insulin to leak inside the pod. By [Elise Reuter](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ereuter/) •March 13, 2026 * [![Image 25: A hand points to a control screen.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/yXFR_KFwczeq3pUJvCS9MwYUTKAbcaLzQG6UH94Buww/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9JdmVuaXhfRnJlc2VuaXVzLmpwZw==.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fresenius-kabi-recalls-ivenix-infusion-pumps-over-software-problem/813645/) ![Image 26: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Retrieved from [Fresenius Kabi](https://www.ivenix.com/nursing-staff/) on March 03, 2026 ![Image 27: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Fresenius Kabi recalls Ivenix infusion pumps over software problem](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fresenius-kabi-recalls-ivenix-infusion-pumps-over-software-problem/813645/) Fresenius has issued a software release to address issues that could interrupt treatment with its Ivenix large volume pumps. By [Elise Reuter](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ereuter/) •March 3, 2026 * [![Image 28: A modern architectural design building featuring a red-brick façade with large glass windows displays a prominent sign of the Food and Drug Administration. ](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/fa3HRGjayYpWlt2I7WXQi4e97JgFcgswDkJqfmH2fXU/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS8yRENKUkI1LmpwZw==.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-posts-early-alert-for-safety-issue-with-impella-heart-pump-devices/813178/) ![Image 29: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Alamy ![Image 30: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [FDA posts early alert for safety issue with Impella heart pump devices](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-posts-early-alert-for-safety-issue-with-impella-heart-pump-devices/813178/) The cassettes have an increased risk of purge leaks that can lead to the loss of hemodynamic support. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Feb. 26, 2026 * [![Image 31: The logo of the Food and Drug Administration is seen in a close-up view of the agency's website.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/0j9V10V5mfmUM10JL28tHWdIpOfXOhIeWGI_51uYtlQ/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0yMjAwODUwODkzLmpwZw==.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/medline-addresses-bed-fire-risk-linked-to-death/812278/) ![Image 32: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Mario Guti via Getty Images ![Image 33: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Medline addresses bed fire risk linked to death](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/medline-addresses-bed-fire-risk-linked-to-death/812278/) The FDA said hand pendants and cords may overheat, causing the devices to spark, burn, melt, smoke and catch fire. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Feb. 18, 2026 * * [![Image 34: A wall bearing the Johnson & Johnson logo is seen outside of an office building.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/hE2QhU4MyPx5bYlvf2LE2lnSehHWX6AI8ScoCn_Lxj0/g:nowe:208:253/c:1738:982/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS85MzMxNjUxLWZhY3Rvcnktc2hvdC5qcGc=.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/JNJ-recalls-Cerepak-coil-systems-aneurysm-treatment/811585/) ![Image 35: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Courtesy of Johnson & Johnson ![Image 36: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [J&J recalls coil systems used in aneurysm treatment](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/JNJ-recalls-Cerepak-coil-systems-aneurysm-treatment/811585/) Healthcare providers are advised to stop using the devices after a failure to detach was linked with four serious injuries and one death. By [Susan Kelly](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/skelly/) •Feb. 6, 2026 * [![Image 37: A modern architectural design building featuring a red-brick façade with large glass windows displays a prominent sign of the Food and Drug Administration. ](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/fa3HRGjayYpWlt2I7WXQi4e97JgFcgswDkJqfmH2fXU/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS8yRENKUkI1LmpwZw==.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/integra-recalls-wound-burn-devices-medihoney/810323/) ![Image 38: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Alamy ![Image 39: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Integra recalls wound and burn devices amid reports of serious injuries](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/integra-recalls-wound-burn-devices-medihoney/810323/) Packaging failures could lead to breaches in the sterile barrier and patient infections. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Jan. 23, 2026 * [![Image 40: Boston Scientific's headquarters building is shown.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/F6Rz5ZaKvD6ImCHqCPlp1Th6IN7txt4cHbDwLg3bYPI/g:nowe:148:0/c:1184:669/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9NYXJsYm9yb3VnaF9IZWFkcXVhcnRlcnNfZnJvbnRfZnVsbC5wbmc=.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/boston-scientific-axios-stent-recall/809947/) ![Image 41: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Courtesy of Boston Scientific ![Image 42: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Boston Scientific recalls stent over issue

chunks.text: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Integra recalls wound and burn devices amid reports of serious injuries](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/integra-recalls-wound-burn-devices-medihoney/810323/) Packaging failures could lead to breaches in the sterile barrier and patient infections. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Jan. 23, 2026 * [![Image 40: Boston Scientific's headquarters building is shown.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/F6Rz5ZaKvD6ImCHqCPlp1Th6IN7txt4cHbDwLg3bYPI/g:nowe:148:0/c:1184:669/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9NYXJsYm9yb3VnaF9IZWFkcXVhcnRlcnNfZnJvbnRfZnVsbC5wbmc=.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/boston-scientific-axios-stent-recall/809947/) ![Image 41: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Courtesy of Boston Scientific ![Image 42: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Boston Scientific recalls stent over issue linked to 3 deaths](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/boston-scientific-axios-stent-recall/809947/) The company said the deaths were associated with off-label or investigational use of the device. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Jan. 20, 2026 * [![Image 43: FDA](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/NEfnNubk-a7JsENwT9PgLDqKhrLErP9UGd4OT8pnFjY/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xMjI3NzEwNDk4X3pJUnRuUlcuanBn.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-medtronic-recall-heart-catheters/808577/) ![Image 44: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Sarah Silbiger via Getty Images ![Image 45: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [FDA posts Class I recall notice about Medtronic heart vent catheters](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-medtronic-recall-heart-catheters/808577/) The company received three complaints about patients who had perforation injuries linked to the devices. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Dec. 23, 2025 * * [![Image 46: A sign for the FDA is shown in front of the headquarters building in Silver Spring, Maryland.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/a8XjgJOihdZX9goNy8xDDh0fFu7K3vFhNXlJBaDvd1c/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xNDEzMjg5OTM2LmpwZw==.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-needs-staff-device-recalls-gao/807900/) ![Image 47: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Getty Images ![Image 48: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [FDA needs more staff, authority to oversee device recalls, watchdog finds](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-needs-staff-device-recalls-gao/807900/) “FDA’s challenges — such as insufficient staffing — can create inefficiencies in the process and potentially put lives at risk,” the U.S. Government Accountability Office said. By [Elise Reuter](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ereuter/) •Dec. 15, 2025 * [![Image 49: FDA headquarters sign](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/1q5y0AC5Nt47OtPBE-3_OsqiYl7lnyMN9pFVyKplVjo/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xMjg2OTcxMjQ1LmpwZw==.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/olympus-recall-ligation-loop-113-injuries/807006/) ![Image 50: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Getty Images ![Image 51: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Olympus reinforces advice over device issue linked to 113 serious injuries](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/olympus-recall-ligation-loop-113-injuries/807006/) The company received complaints that the ligation loop can become unintentionally anchored in place. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Dec. 4, 2025 * [![Image 52: Becton Dickinson logo](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/Qe-heyO3ncdVdG5xu48ixpb5tCJLG9okUpHkeXSjf6E/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9lZGl0b3JpYWwtYmVjdG9uLWRpY2tpbnNvbi1hbmQtY29tcGFueS1mb290YWdlLTA4NjQ5NjA4OF9wcmV2c3RpbGwuanBlZw==.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-correction-dropped-bd-alaris-pumps/806742/) ![Image 53: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Permission granted by Becton Dickinson ![Image 54: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [FDA flags risk from dropped BD Alaris pumps after 2 injury reports](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-correction-dropped-bd-alaris-pumps/806742/) BD told customers to immediately remove from use any devices they drop or severely jar. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Dec. 2, 2025 * [![Image 55: A person on a stationary bike wears a small, white patch on their upper arm.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/CFSvSBPdiLGX7NCPaUiM678Aq59hWC_Zcy1zyj51UJQ/g:nowe:0:65/c:1440:814/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9BYmJvdHRfTGlicmVfM19saWZlc3R5bGVfaW1hZ2UucG5n.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/abbott-libre-3-correction-accuracy/806345/) ![Image 56: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Permission granted by Abbott Laboratories ![Image 57: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Abbott issues correction for millions of glucose sensors](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/abbott-libre-3-correction-accuracy/806345/) The problem applies to Abbott’s Libre 3 and Libre 3 Plus sensors. The company said it has received reports of 736 severe adverse events and seven deaths. By [Elise Reuter](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ereuter/) •Nov. 24, 2025 * [![Image 58: An oval shaped device on a patch says Dexcom G6.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/n-aRKPZgSg_ozcg2vncXPrkSuM5j5d9iGDOkQwQuAd0/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9EZXhjb21fRzYucG5n.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/dexcom-recall-g6-cgm-app/804630/) ![Image 59: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Courtesy of Dexcom ![Image 60: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Dexcom recalls G6 CGM app over software problem](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/dexcom-recall-g6-cgm-app/804630/) A software defect could cause the app to terminate, resulting in missed alerts or alarms. Dexcom required users to download an update. By [Elise Reuter](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ereuter/) •Nov. 4, 2025 * [![Image 61: illustration of a heart showing a tube-shaped device going into the left ventricle](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/LJijA1iGRpRTMR5tQG7BXSrNhKN7Us-mRtuSrJ99iW0/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9BYmlvbWVkX2hlYXJ0X3B1bXBfcmVzaXplZC5wbmc=.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/JNJ-Abiomed-recall-cybersecurity-heart-pump-controller/802685/) ![Image 62: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Courtesy of Abiomed ![Image 63: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Cybersecurity triggers another recall of J&J’s Impella heart pump controller](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/JNJ-Abiomed-recall-cybersecurity-heart-pump-controller/802685/) While no patients have been harmed, the FDA categorized the action as a Class

By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Oct. 14, 2025 * [![Image 64: FDA headquarters sign](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/1q5y0AC5Nt47OtPBE-3_OsqiYl7lnyMN9pFVyKplVjo/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xMjg2OTcxMjQ1LmpwZw==.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-expands-early-alert-pilot-medical-devices/761438/) ![Image 65: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Getty Images ![Image 66: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [FDA expands early alert program to cover all medical devices](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/fda-expands-early-alert-pilot-medical-devices/761438/) After a successful pilot, the agency has lifted the limitations on when it will provide early information about potentially high-risk safety events. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Sept. 30, 2025 * [![Image 67: illustration of a heart showing a tube-shaped device going into the left ventricle](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/LJijA1iGRpRTMR5tQG7BXSrNhKN7Us-mRtuSrJ99iW0/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9BYmlvbWVkX2hlYXJ0X3B1bXBfcmVzaXplZC5wbmc=.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/abiomed-third-heart-pump-controller-recall/760961/) ![Image 68: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Courtesy of Abiomed ![Image 69: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [J&J’s Abiomed starts third heart pump controller recall since June](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/abiomed-third-heart-pump-controller-recall/760961/) As of Aug. 27, the company had reported five serious injuries and no deaths associated with the issue. By [Nick Paul Taylor](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ntaylor/) •Sept. 24, 2025 * [![Image 70: FDA](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/NEfnNubk-a7JsENwT9PgLDqKhrLErP9UGd4OT8pnFjY/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xMjI3NzEwNDk4X3pJUnRuUlcuanBn.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/olympus-remove-aspiration-needles-lung-biopsy/760877/) ![Image 71: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Sarah Silbiger via Getty Images ![Image 72: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Olympus removes needles after patient death](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/olympus-remove-aspiration-needles-lung-biopsy/760877/) Olympus is recalling certain lots of needles, used for lung cancer biopsy, because components can detach during procedures. By [Elise Reuter](https://www.medtechdive.com/editors/ereuter/) • Updated Oct. 1, 2025 * [![Image 73: A patient recovers after a total knee replacement surgery.](https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/uRuSlQH8RNrkR21-2LWr5dX-888f4x_xkdzkz46mbJA/g:ce/rs:fill:1200:675:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9LbmVlX3N1cmdlcnkuanBn.webp)](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/exactech-settlement-false-claims-knee-implants/760688/) ![Image 74: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220)Getty Images ![Image 75: Image attribution tooltip](https://www.medtechdive.com/static/images/info-icon.png?234917240220) ### [Exactech agrees to $8M settlement over defective knee implants](https://www.medtechdive.com/news/exactech-settlement-false-claims-knee-implants/760688/) The payment resolves allegations brought by the Department of Justice that Exactech violated the False Claims Act by selling knee implants with components that failed prematurely.
